positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a glowing bioluminescent forest canopy at twilight. The main subject is a cluster of oversized, stylized tropical flora, including giant, glowing fern fronds and orchid blossoms that emit soft, ethereal light. Scattered among the foliage are delicate, glowing fireflies and stylized woodland spirits (small, abstract, joyful figures). The composition should be centrally balanced, emphasizing strong, dark silhouettes of the leaves against the vibrant, contrasting bioluminescent light sources. Use a highly saturated, jewel-toned color palette dominated by emerald greens, sapphire blues, and luminous cyan highlights, with touches of deep violet. The style should be a seamless, stylized vector illustration mixed with the feel of illuminated watercolor, designed to wrap around a shirt. High contrast, intricate linework, and clean edges are crucial.
negative: blur, noise, grain, lowres, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, watermark, logos, signatures, copyrighted characters, dirty, messy, out of frame, jpeg artifacts
